calendar.matters: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR EMERGENCY TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND STAY OF FORECLOSURE ACTION

EX OARTE APPLICATION TO SPECIALLY SET HEARING ON PETITION FOR EMEGENCY STAY OF FORECLOSURE ON MAY 26, 2026
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Denied

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Continued To Sep-15-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stefany Yagol appeared via zoom (petitioner).
Paul Windust appeared via zoom.
Michael Rinne appeared via zoom.

Mr. Rinne confirmed that the property located on 229 Brannen St. is apart of the trust, that there currently a matter set in Contra Cosa County for a Petition for Instructions, and that they request to come back to San Francisco Courts after the Instructions hearing takes place. The matter is continued to September 15, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bloom. Not reported.
